requirement.en: When your opponent Normal or Special Summons a monster.

effect.en: Send 1 monster from your hand or field to the Graveyard. Then, you can Special Summon up to 2 Wyrm Type monsters from your Graveyard to your field in face-up Defense Position. Then, if you Special Summoned "Magiclad Dragon - Vezzal the Star Eater" by this effect, you can change 1 face-up monster on your opponent's field to face-down Defense Position.
